metadata.instruction: Find the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song on Chrome. Once you find the lyrics, save the webpage as a PDF so I can print it.
metadata.context: I want to print the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song.

actions.window_title: Program Manager

l3.rationale: Ctrl key pressed while JAWS 2025 list item is focused; no visible UI action beyond maintaining focus.

l4.rationale: Switched into Chrome and dismissed the restore prompt to reach a usable browser workspace.

l5.rationale: Bringing the browser/application into focus before starting the web search.

actions.window_title: Program Manager

l5.rationale: Bringing the browser/application into focus before starting the web search.
